                have h₁₈ : 9 ≤ r := h₁₇.1
                omega
              have h₁₇ : ¬(8 < r) := by omega
              have h₁₈ : ¬(9 < r) := by omega
              have h₁₉ : ¬(r < 3) := by omega
              have h₂₀ : 2 < r := by omega
              simp [h₁₅, h₁₆, h₁₇, h₁₈, h₁₉, h₂₀]
              <;> norm_num <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    interval_cases r <;> norm_num at h ⊢ <;>
                    (try omega) <;>
                    (try simp_all [Nat.lt_succ_iff])
                  })
              <;>
              (try
                {
                  aesop
                })
            exact h₁₄
    exact h₇
  | inr h₄ =>
    -- Case: r ≥ 9
    have h₅ : r ≥ 9 := h₄
    have h₆ : r < n := h₂
    have h₇ : (if r < 9 then "CF" else "C") ++ (if 9 ≤ r ∧ r < n then "F" else if r < 9 then "F" else "") ++ (if 8 < r then "B" else "") ++ (if 9 < r then "B" else "") ++ (if r < 3 then "T" else "D") ++ (if 2 < r then "D" else "T") = "CFBDT" := by
      have h₈ : ¬(r < 9) := by omega
      have h₉ : 9 ≤ r := by omega
      have h₁₀ : 9 ≤ r ∧ r < n := by
        exact ⟨h₉, h₆⟩
      have h₁₁ : 8 < r := by omega
      have h₁₂ : 9 < r ∨ 9 = r := by omega
      cases h₁₂ with
      | inl h₁₂ =>
        -- Subcase: 9 < r
        have h₁₃ : 9 < r := h₁₂
        have h₁₄ : (if r < 9 then "CF" else "C") ++ (if 9 ≤ r ∧ r < n then "F" else if r < 9 then "F" else "") ++ (if 8 < r then "B" else "") ++ (if 9 < r then "B" else "") ++ (if r < 3 then "T" else "D") ++ (if 2 < r then "D" else "T") = "CFBDT" := by
          have h₁₅ : ¬(r < 9) := by omega
          have h₁₆ : 9 ≤ r ∧ r < n := h₁₀
          have h₁₇ : 8 < r := by omega
          have h₁₈ : 9 < r := h₁₃
          have h₁₉ : ¬(r < 3) := by omega
          have h₂₀ : 2 < r := by omega
          simp [h₁₅, h₁₆, h₁₇, h₁₈, h₁₉, h₂₀]
          <;> norm_num <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                interval_cases r <;> norm_num at h ⊢ <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try simp_all [Nat.lt_succ_iff])
              })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              aesop
            })
        exact h₁₄
      | inr h₁₂ =>
        -- Subcase: r = 9
        have h₁₃ : r = 9 := by omega
        have h₁₄ : (if r < 9 then "CF" else "C") ++ (if 9 ≤ r ∧ r < n then "F" else if r < 9 then "F" else "") ++ (if 8 < r then "B" else "") ++ (if 9 < r then "B" else "") ++ (if r < 3 then "T" else "D") ++ (if 2 < r then "D" else "T") = "CFBDT" := by
          have h₁₅ : ¬(r < 9) := by omega
          have h₁₆ : 9 ≤ r ∧ r < n := h₁₀
          have h₁₇ : 8 < r := by omega
          have h₁₈ : ¬(9 < r) := by omega
          have h₁₉ : ¬(r < 3) := by omega
          have h₂₀ : 2 < r := by omega
          simp [h₁₅, h₁₆, h₁₇, h₁₈, h₁₉, h₂₀]
          <;> norm_num <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                interval_cases r <;> norm_num at h ⊢ <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try simp_all [Nat.lt_succ_iff])
              })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              aesop
            })
        exact h₁₄
    exact h₇
